examples: So far, the election campaign has been a very gentlemanly affair.
He was respected by all who knew him for his kind and gentlemanly consideration.
Can you get more gentlemanly than this?
Mr Denard could look gentlemanly, smart in grey suits or his spurious colonel's uniform.
The question is how far fast-moving realities will run ahead of the communion's slow-moving and gentlemanly procedures.
